steps.message: Fix the failing NullPointerException in OrderService.persist() in the dutch-kis project
The repository call returns an Optional that is being unwrapped with .get(). I'll switch to orElseThrow(NotFoundException::new) so the missing-row case is handled.
Applied the fix and ran the suite: rtk mvn test -Dtest=OrderServiceTest -> BUILD SUCCESS, 142 passed, 0 failed.
